_description: CS-NATS stack — UPSTREAM base images consumed via the Dockerfiles and the sidecars. The monitor tracks their digests and triggers a release when one moves. It MUST NOT track this repo's own published images (ghcr.io/bauer-group/cs-nats/*): doing so would loop — a release republishes them, their digest moves, the monitor fires again, forever.

images.name: nats
images.description: NATS server base image, floating 2.x on Alpine (src/nats/Dockerfile)

images.name: python-alpine
images.description: Runtime base for the nats-init container (src/nats-init/Dockerfile)

images.name: nats-box
images.description: Provides the nats CLI for nats-init (multi-stage) and the nats-box service

images.name: prometheus-nats-exporter
images.description: Prometheus exporter scraping the node monitoring endpoints (docker-compose*.yml)
